mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_quiz ( question, quiz_type, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, correct_options, explanation, difficulty, tags, status, source ) VALUES
(#{quiz.question}, #{quiz.quizType}, #{quiz.optionA}, #{quiz.optionB}, #{quiz.optionC}, #{quiz.optionD}, #{quiz.correctOptions}, #{quiz.explanation}, #{quiz.difficulty}, #{quiz.tags}, #{quiz.status}, #{quiz.source})
mapper.select: SELECT r.answer_date, q.question, q.quiz_type, q.correct_options, r.selected_options, r.is_correct FROM t_user_quiz_record r JOIN t_quiz q ON r.quiz_id = q.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.answer_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
